notes: Git-anchored evals against the REAL GymApp project — no synthetic fixtures. Ground truth is human-validated: the 2026-06-29 lib-generation review's findings were subsequently FIXED by implemented phases, so a worktree pinned at 96e3553 (pre-fix) is a recall fixture with known answers, and HEAD is an absence fixture (the fixed findings must not be re-reported). Case specs: rpiv/evals/cases/architectural-review/. Grading: rpiv/evals/harness/grade-artifact.mjs (executable checks only). Ground-truth provenance: rpiv/evals/cases/ground-truth/ar-lib-generation-96e3553.json (generated by harness/extract-ground-truth.mjs). Run: node rpiv/evals/harness/run-eval.mjs --case <case.json> --rundir <dir>. See rpiv/evals/README.md.

evals.name: known-slop-recall-adaptive
evals.prompt: /rpiv:architectural-review the adaptive sub-pipeline of lib/generation (adaptive-context + adaptive-application + their barrels) — anti-slop pass.
evals.expected_output: At ref 96e3553 the review re-finds the human-validated slop: M1 load-cap dup (apply+validate), M3 snapshot projection dup, D1 exact/family clamp fork, A4 dead export — with resolvable citations and non-zero counts on the M/D/A lenses.
assertions: grade-artifact: >=95% citations resolve at the pinned ref; verbatim quotes match
grade-artifact: recall M1 (2 of 3 known sites), M3, D1 (both fork sides), A4
grade-artifact: slop_by_lens non-zero for missing_abstraction, duplication, dead_abstraction

evals.name: fixed-slop-absence-adaptive
evals.prompt: Same target, at HEAD (after the fixes landed).
evals.expected_output: A review that does NOT re-report the consolidated load-cap, shared snapshot projection, or unified clamp fork as fresh slop; remaining real findings are allowed.
assertions: grade-artifact: >=95% citations resolve at HEAD; verbatim quotes match
grade-artifact: absence M1-fixed, M3-fixed, D1-fixed (pair+pattern match within one finding unit)
